attestation.statement: Clinician confirmed in writing having clinically reviewed all 51 answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation)

codes_manifest.display: Alcohol induced acute pancreatitis without necrosis or infection

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00010, derived from source AUC-010) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-GI-01 bucket.

Source note describes in-person IM ketorolac/ondansetron administration and physical exam (epigastric tenderness, absent bowel sounds, Cullen's/Grey Turner's screening); presentation layer de-anchored to patient-reportable content, with all examination findings sealed into 10/11 and IM ketorolac not carried into 12 (NSAID flagged should_NOT_recommend for telehealth self-management given volume-depletion risk).

Vitals (including borderline hypotension 100/65 and HR 120) were clinician-measured in person and were not placed in 01.objective_data_offered; the patient-reported weakness/lightheadedness (DI-004) was used instead as the telehealth-obtainable equivalent.

Draft SNOMED placeholders in 10_ground_truth_node.differential_progression for the peptic ulcer perforation entries were corrected to a real candidate code (196614001) prior to finalising this bundle.
Exact age not stated in source; a plausible adult age (42) consistent with the alcohol-trigger history and 'sibling present' framing was assigned as a conservative placeholder.
No guideline references were cited in the source note; guideline_references left as an empty array.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
